dynamic_rules.description: Avoid trading when confidence levels are below 50, as indicated by light_skip decisions with conf <= 50. This suggests insufficient conviction in the setup.
Be cautious when delta is positive but price isn't advancing, as this may indicate trapped buyers rather than genuine selling pressure. Look for confirming volume spikes or delta reversals.

Avoid entries when big trades are concentrated in wicks rather than body absorption. Wick rejections without body close outside IB are lower probability. NOTE: This rule DOES NOT APPLY to IMBALANCE_HUNTING on M1, where momentum supersedes structural closes.
Avoid trades when bar closes inside IB and trades’ absorption is observed in wicks and not bodies. This increases the risk of structural stop placement.
Avoid trades when there is an excess tail detected without clear body absorption, as this increases the risk of stop runs and false breakouts.
Exercise additional caution during transition_state day types, as these periods often exhibit lower conviction and higher risk of false breakouts.
Require confirming volume spikes or delta reversals when delta is positive but price isn't advancing to avoid trades with trapped buyers.
Require confirming price action (close outside IB or significant body absorption) when big trades are concentrated in wicks to avoid false breakouts.

Require candle body to close completely outside the IB range for IVB breakout trades to confirm true price acceptance. NOTE: This rule DOES NOT APPLY to IMBALANCE_HUNTING on M1, where we enter intra-candle.

Avoid trades when big trades are concentrated in wicks and the candle body does not close outside the IB range, as this increases the risk of false breakouts. NOTE: This rule DOES NOT APPLY to IMBALANCE_HUNTING on M1.

Wait for the Initiative phase (delta aggressively flipping direction to sweep the book) before entering trades to confirm true breakouts. NOTE: This rule DOES NOT APPLY to IMBALANCE_HUNTING on M1, where continuous aggressive flow is sufficient.
Require candle body to close completely outside the IVB range for IVB breakout trades to confirm true price acceptance. This rule applies to all IVB breakout setups to avoid false breakouts.
Exercise additional caution during imbalance_hunting setups when delta is positive but price isn't advancing, as this may indicate trapped buyers rather than genuine selling pressure.
During imbalance_hunting setups, if price contracts and delta diverges, reduce contracts or skip the trade to avoid trapped liquidity.
During imbalance_hunting setups, ensure delta confirms price direction. If delta shows trapped buyers despite price moving lower, reduce contracts or skip the trade.
Require a second drive (re-testing the level after a pullback) for IVB breakout trades to confirm true price acceptance and avoid false breakouts.
During imbalance_hunting setups, ensure momentum confirms the direction of the trade. If momentum is weak or conflicting, reduce contracts or skip the trade.
Avoid entries before confirming momentum and delta alignment during imbalance_hunting setups to prevent early stops.
During imbalance_hunting setups, ensure delta confirms price direction. If delta shows trapped buyers despite price moving lower, reduce contracts or skip the trade.
Avoid early exits when momentum and delta alignment are still confirming the trade direction during imbalance_hunting setups to prevent premature profit-taking.

session_learnings: Several trades were stopped out due to stops being placed at the absolute extreme of wicks, exposing them to retail liquidity pools and stop hunts.
Early exits were observed in profitable trades, indicating a need for better patience and confirmation of momentum and delta alignment before exiting.
The session highlighted the importance of confirming momentum and delta alignment during imbalance_hunting setups to avoid early stops and maximize profitable trades.
